t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Real (funded) customer ID. Hash distribution key. The primary customer identifier in the DWH ecosystem. FK to Dim_Customer (if exists). 46.4M distinct values.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Real (funded) customer ID. The primary customer identifier in the DWH ecosystem.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'Hash distribution key', 'FK to Dim_Customer (if exists)', '46.4M distinct values' — FSC-specific context, core meaning preserved

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short code for the regulation. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. 8 values observed: FCA, ASIC & GAML, FSA Seychelles, ASIC, CySEC, MAS, FSRA, BVI.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards'; added observed values (enrichment not loss)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Tier display name from eToro Club loyalty program. 6 values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. IDs are NOT in rank order — use Dim_PlayerLevel.Sort for ordering.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'Internal, N/A' from value enumeration, dropped 'Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI', rewrote opening phrase

issues.problem: Tier 1 description is paraphrased. Upstream Dim_PlayerLevel.Name says 'Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.' but wiki rewrites entirely and drops Internal/N/A values.
Tier 1 description drops upstream metadata: 'Hash distribution key', 'FK to Dim_Customer (if exists)', '46.4M distinct values' from Fact_SnapshotCustomer wiki.
Regulation and Club columns list values but not in key=value format (e.g., RegulationID 1=CySEC, 2=FCA). The SP source contains these mappings.
Tier legend only includes T1 and T2 rows. Standard shape requires all 5 tiers listed even if unused.
Element description says 'Negated SUM' without explaining why positive = company revenue. The Gotcha in 3.4 clarifies but element description should be self-contained.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Replace Club description with verbatim from Dim_PlayerLevel wiki: 'Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.' (2) Replace RealCID description with verbatim from Fact_SnapshotCustomer wiki including 'Hash distribution key' and 'FK to Dim_Customer'. (3) Add key=value pairs for Regulation and Club dictionary columns. (4) Expand tier legend to show all 5 tiers.
